prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1JZ-GTE VVT-i (2.5L inline-6) with a forged internals build (CP pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, Tomei 264° camshafts) and a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor) running 1.5 bar of boost on E85 fuel, paired with a GReddy Trust T518Z triple-plate clutch and a Cusco 1.5-way LSD for the JZX110 chassis

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 4-2-1 header design (equal-length primaries) and a custom 3.5-inch titanium muffler by Fujitsubo Giken, paired with a Tomei Type-S front pipe and a custom 3-inch downpipe with a 4-inch flex section

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Verossa’s 5-link rear suspension) with Swift Springs (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear) and Cusco pillowball upper mounts, paired with a Cusco front strut bar and a custom 3-point rear strut brace by Buddy Club for chassis rigidity
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (JZX110-specific, 30mm front fender flares, 40mm rear) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon, paired with a custom front bumper lip by TRD (1998 JGTC replica) and a custom rear diffuser by Veilside Fortune 03

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +15 front and 18x10.5 +25 rear wheels (gunmetal finish) with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear), paired with custom extended wheel studs by 5Zigen and DBA 4000 Series rotors with Project Mu HC+ brake pads

Full custom interior by Bride (Zeta III seats with Alcantara and red stitching) and a custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point bolt-in, chromoly) with a custom Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a Defi BF gauge cluster (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod
